title: neillia glabrata
intro: Neillia glabrata, also known as the smooth neillia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The smooth neillia is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Smooth neillia can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
